seoTitle: Pyramid Hill vs Quandong — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Pyramid Hill and Quandong. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Pyramid Hill vs Quandong: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pyramid Hill and Quandong.
heading: Pyramid Hill vs Quandong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pyramid Hill, Victoria and Quandong, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pyramid Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Quandong (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pyramid Hill or Quandong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pyramid Hill has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Quandong scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pyramid Hill scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Quandong scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pyramid Hill or Quandong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pyramid Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
